content.en:
"Not dead?"

Ye Tian thought that he could kill the Phantom Ruin Snake with this blow, but he didn't expect to kill it.

But he also knew why he didn't kill this phantom snake, its body was indeed weak and vulnerable, but the opponent's body was not the most important, the will was its most important, and it was not fatal to pierce the body.

If you can't wipe out the will of the other party, it will be difficult to kill them, which is the peculiarity of the Phantom Ruin Snake.

"The strength of the Phantom Ruin Snake is very strong, even if the top Eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord encounters it, it is not an opponent, and it will even be killed by it!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

But.

He thought that he could still kill the Phantom Ruin Snake, after all, he could master the Supreme Divine Power of Reincarnation and the Supreme Treasure of Reincarnation.

Kill!!!!

Ye Tian and the Phantom Ruin Snake kept fighting, hurting the Phantom Ruin Snake again and again, but his own will was also hurt by the other party.

"It's a pity that I don't have a defensive reincarnation supreme supernatural power, otherwise the Phantom Ruin Snake wouldn't be able to hurt me at all!" Ye Tian said darkly.

After a period of fighting, this phantom ruin snake was still killed by Ye Tian.

However, his injuries are not light, mainly above the will, but not in the physical body.

And the wound of will, there are some troubles to recover.

"No matter, if it takes a long time to slowly repair the wound of will, this replica body will be like this, if you really can't bear it, just change to a replica body!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

After killing this phantom ruin snake, Ye Tian found a strange transparent crystal bead from the phantom ruin snake's body.

He refined a transparent crystal bead, and preliminarily judged that these transparent crystal beads would help refine the will of the Origin Realm.

"Good thing, let's call it the Illusory Crystal Bead!"

Ye Tian collected these Phantom Ruins Crystal Beads, and then looked for resources in this area.

This should be the territory of this illusory snake, otherwise it wouldn't have fought for so long without other creatures to support.

Subsequently, Ye Tian was looking for resources in this area.

It didn't take long for him to find something good.

"Mushroom Vine !!!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited when he saw this emerald green vine.

The mushroom vine is a very rare treasure, he has only seen it in the treasure illustrated book of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, this is a treasure that even the Eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords are extremely eager for!

The mushroom vine can be ground into powder and fused with the water of reincarnation to form a special mushroom vine liquid, which can greatly improve the cultivation of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord, and has a great effect on the eight awakenings of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord.

Refining the physical body, improving the origin, and even refining the will of the origin realm to a small extent.

Moreover, the Ruin Mushroom Vine can be combined with several rare resources to refine the first secret medicine of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan-the Reincarnation Realm Breaking Pill!

The Reincarnation Breaking Realm Pill is the success of countless members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, it can guarantee that the Seven Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords have a ninety percent chance of breaking through to the Eight Awakenings Origin Upper Realm Overlord Realm, and it can also make the Eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords have a 10% chance of breaking through to the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord Realms.

Don't underestimate this odds, it's already a high odds.

In the land of eternity, those Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the Eighth Awakening were extremely eager to become the Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the Ninth Awakening, but they had no hope of breaking through, and they all stayed in the Origin Upper Realm Overlord Realm of the Eighth Awakening.

Of course.

The Reincarnation Realm Breaking Pill is only suitable for the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, it is useless for the Reincarnation Source Clan, and it is naturally useless for the Origin Upper Realm Overlord of the Land of Eternity, at most it can be used to improve cultivation.

It can also be seen from this that the mushroom vine is really rare and valuable.

"Mine!"

Ye Tian took this ruin mushroom vine directly, and then left here, handing it over to the other replica bodies.

In this way, it is safe, otherwise the replica body of the expedition falls, and the resources found may really be gone.

In the following days, Ye Tian found a lot of good things here.

【Infinite Sunstone】

【Linlong Gold Liquid】

【Taifeng Golden Sap】

All kinds of resources that were rare and made the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm fight for their lives after the eight awakenings were all found by Ye Tian.

If these resources are given to him, it is enough to make his cultivation improve quickly, but if he wants to attack the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm of the Nine Awakenings, it is still a little worse.

Therefore, he still needs to continue to explore the depths of the reincarnation purple abyss.

Subsequently, he continued to go deeper into the depths of the Reincarnation Purple Abyss, and soon encountered even more terrifying creatures.

Rumble!!!!!

A centipede with countless legs appeared in Ye Tian's perception.

【Reincarnation Purple Gold Centipede】

The aura of this centipede was terrifying, even more terrifying than the previous phantom snake.

Although its cultivation did not reach the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord Realm, it was not much worse, much stronger than the Eighth Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord.

The point is that this reincarnation purple gold centipede has awakened the supreme supernatural power of reincarnation.

Rumble!!!!

The reincarnation purple gold centipede spat out countless poisonous mist, turning into strange hands that pierced through the void.

Ye Tian tried to disperse these poisonous mist hands, but he was still injured by them.

I saw that his flesh was corroded by the poisonous mist little by little, but he still used the Ruin Sky Spear to injure this reincarnation purple gold centipede.

Thundered!!!!!

The two sides kept fighting, and no one escaped.

Ye Tian's replica body was constantly eroded and collapsed by the poisonous mist, but he also tried his best to hurt the reincarnation purple gold centipede again and again.

But in the end, his replica body still didn't fight.

......

"This replica body has fallen!"

The replica body in another muttered.

This reincarnation purple gold centipede cultivation is already terrifying, and it also has the supreme power of reincarnation, and it is normal for its combat power to be even higher than him.

"No wonder the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan doesn't dare to attack the Reincarnation Purple Abyss, even if it is a Nine-Awakened Origin Upper Realm Overlord who can enter here, but if his cultivation is suppressed to the Seventh-Awakened Origin Upper Realm Overlord Realm, this Reincarnation Purple Gold Cinnipede will be killed!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Therefore, even if the Reincarnation Celestial Clan does whatever it takes, it cannot bulldoze the Reincarnation Purple Abyss, so it can only block the Reincarnation Purple Abyss and prevent the creatures of the Reincarnation Purple Abyss from coming out.

"The Reincarnation Purple Gold Centipede should not be the most powerful creature in the Reincarnation Purple Abyss, and the creatures behind it must be more powerful, but once you kill them, you will definitely gain a lot!"

At this moment, Ye Tian wanted to kill this reincarnation purple gold centipede, and it was very promising.

He had already injured this reincarnation purple gold centipede before, and now he could continue to attack this reincarnation purple gold centipede without giving it a chance to heal.
